title: B70 0EB, 2 Sisters Food group limited: environmental permit  issued - EPR/JP3433WU/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:    Operator name: 2 Sisters Food group limited   Installation name: 2 Sisters Food Group (Site D)   Permit number: EPR/JP3433WU/V002   "
